skills.name: JSON to Studio
skills.description: Parses, validates, normalizes, and indexes design-system JSON into studio-ready records.

skills.name: Design Lock Audit
skills.description: Checks the WHISPERX visual identity against typography, controlled signal color, light/dark behavior, spatial hierarchy, and motion constraints.

skills.name: UI UX Pro Max
skills.description: Pinned design-intelligence skill with an inspectable local runtime adapter for product patterns, styles, palettes, typography, accessibility, motion, and stack-specific quality checks.

skills.name: Install Planner
skills.description: Builds a dependency-aware install plan with duplicate/conflict checks and rollback notes before writing user files.

library.title: Studio Shell
library.summary: Editorial workspace that connects import, library, preview, export, and install surfaces without replacing the approved marketplace experience.

library.title: Design Intelligence Workbench
library.summary: Interactive UI/UX recommendation workbench backed by the pinned local UI UX Pro Max runtime dataset and API.

library.title: Marketing Library
library.summary: Indexes current landing surfaces and classifies approved WHISPERX identity content for reuse.

library.title: Gallery Library
library.summary: Registers available public imagery and preview states while marking external asset ingestion as partial.
